name: math-aggregate-low-reasoning
description: Same as orchestration4 but uses systemPromptMode replace and low reasoning level.

steps.name: step-1
steps.systemPrompt: You are a calculator. You receive a number and add 1 to it. Reply with ONLY the resulting number, nothing else. No words, no explanation, just the number.

steps.name: step-2
steps.systemPrompt: You are a calculator. You receive a number and add 1 to it. Reply with ONLY the resulting number, nothing else. No words, no explanation, just the number.
steps.userPrompt: Add 1 to the number from the previous step.

steps.name: step-3
steps.systemPrompt: You are a calculator. You receive a number and add 1 to it. Reply with ONLY the resulting number, nothing else. No words, no explanation, just the number.
steps.userPrompt: Add 1 to the number from the previous step.

steps.name: step-4
steps.systemPrompt: You are a calculator. You receive a number and add 1 to it. Reply with ONLY the resulting number, nothing else. No words, no explanation, just the number.
steps.userPrompt: Add 1 to the number from the previous step.
